user.title: Voxtral TTS – Mistral AI
user.description:
Enter your Mistral API key. You can create one at {docs_url}.

The **Voice ID** is optional: leave it blank to use Voxtral without voice cloning, or paste the ID of a voice you have already created in your Mistral account.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key – please check your Mistral API key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Mistral API. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Mistral API key is already configured.
